errors.message: Target "pi-cli-proxy" is an agent provider ("pi-cli") with no grader_target — agent providers cannot return structured JSON for grading. Set grader_target to an LLM provider (e.g., azure-llm).

content.text: In one short sentence, answer this: what is 2 + 2? Include the exact word component-results.
Target "pi-cli-proxy" is an agent provider ("pi-cli") with no grader_target — agent providers cannot return structured JSON for grading. Set grader_target to an LLM provider (e.g., azure-llm).
